```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.7em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;">stage</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#D45F47;line-height:1;">03</span>
  <span style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">Sprint contracts</span>
 </div>

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);">
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.4em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin:0 auto;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">SPRINT-3.md</span>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:0.85em 1.2em 1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
   <div style="color:#FF6F8E;font-weight:700;"># Sprint 3 Contract</div>

   <div style="color:#FFB84D;margin-top:0.4em;">## Goal</div>
   <div>Add OAuth login flow to existing auth module.</div>

   <div style="color:#FFB84D;margin-top:0.4em;">## Done means</div>
   <div><span style="color:#27C93F;">[ ]</span> Google sign-in flow completes</div>
   <div><span style="color:#27C93F;">[ ]</span> Session persists across reloads</div>
   <div><span style="color:#27C93F;">[ ]</span> Existing email/password still works</div>
   <div><span style="color:#27C93F;">[ ]</span> All new code has unit tests, all pass</div>
   <div><span style="color:#27C93F;">[ ]</span> No TODOs or stubs in shipped code</div>

   <div style="color:#FFB84D;margin-top:0.4em;">## Out of scope</div>
   <div><span style="color:#9B8EA0;">·</span> GitHub OAuth (separate sprint)</div>
   <div><span style="color:#9B8EA0;">·</span> Login page UI redesign</div>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-style:italic;">
  disagreements happen during <strong style="color:#C4881A;font-style:normal;">drafting</strong>, not at the end.
 </div>

</div>
```
